tagline: Genie Spaces renamed to Genie Agents: Genie Spaces are now called Genie Agents.
what_it_does: Genie Spaces renamed to Genie Agents: Genie Spaces are now called Genie Agents. SQL expressions grouped with example SQL: In the authoring experience, SQL expressions are now grouped with example SQL queries so you can define and manage both in one place. Consistent Genie Agent experience in Genie One: In Genie One, a Genie Agent now opens as a chat if you have viewing rights only, or in the Analytics and AI workspace UI if you have authoring privileges.
why_it_matters: Genie One is the simplified Databricks UI for business users, a single entry point for interacting with data and AI without navigating technical concepts like compute, queries, models, or notebooks.
plain_summary: Genie Spaces renamed to Genie Agents: Genie Spaces are now called Genie Agents. SQL expressions grouped with example SQL: In the authoring experience, SQL expressions are now grouped with example SQL queries so you can define and manage both in one place.
key_takeaway: Genie Spaces renamed to Genie Agents: Genie Spaces are now called Genie Agents.
